separation_notes: This dataset is separate from the dashboard dataset so the dashboard remains a clean observed-data view while forecast training can include older history and external drivers.
Missing values are allowed for target columns in older years where source-backed series were not yet integrated; the trainer drops missing rows per target.
Policy assumptions are kept in a separate file at server/data/policyAssumptions.json so scenario settings do not get mixed into observed data.

fields.source: USDA FAS GAIN India Oilseeds and Products Update reports for older years and WITS / World Bank for 2017 onward
fields.notes: 2013-2016 values use USDA report tables. 2017 onward follows the WITS series already used by the dashboard.

fields.source: WITS / World Bank trade data for India imports of HS 151110 (Crude palm oil)
fields.notes: Available from 2017 onward in this training dataset and stored as USD million.

fields.source: USDA FAS IPAD India Palm Oil Area, Yield and Production, with older USDA GAIN table values
fields.notes: 2013-2014 values use older USDA table values. 2015 onward aligns to the USDA series used in the dashboard.

fields.source: USDA FAS IPAD India Palm Oil Area, Yield and Production
fields.notes: Available from 2015 onward in this training dataset.
Official exchange rate (LCU per US$, period average) for India, added for 2005-2024.

fields.source: World Bank Pink Sheet annual commodity prices
fields.notes: Annual nominal world palm oil price, used as a global market driver.

fields.source: World Bank Pink Sheet annual commodity prices
fields.notes: Competing edible oil benchmark added for substitution pressure analysis.

fields.source: World Bank Pink Sheet annual commodity indices
fields.notes: Annual fertilizer price index (2010 = 100), added as a farm-cost pressure indicator.
